key_decisions.original_text: Skip expensive Blob DevNet; test Fusaka features on Holesky/Sepolia instead
key_decisions.context: testing directly on testnets to save resources

key_decisions.original_text: Use dedicated CPU instances for 1-2 days on bal-devnet-2 for benchmarking
EPBS DevNet 0: stable network without sync/malicious testing initially
Payload attestations will be ignored in EPBS DevNet 0; not breaking clients
State Actor tool runs parallel to BloatNet for different testing purposes
